evals.prompt: Build a REST API endpoint in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Use ApiResource class extending JsonResource; return new UserResource($user) or UserResource::collection($users); never return raw $model; apply auth:sanctum middleware in routes/api.php

evals.prompt: Set up API Resources and Collections in Laravel
evals.expected_output: php artisan make:resource UserResource; implement toArray() to define output fields; use UserResource::collection($users) for lists; never use response()->json($model) directly

evals.prompt: How do I use Sanctum for API authentication in Laravel?
evals.expected_output: Install sanctum, add HasApiTokens to User, protect routes with auth:sanctum middleware, issue tokens with $user->createToken('token-name')->plainTextToken; use Passport only for OAuth2 flows

evals.prompt: Add rate limiting to my Laravel API routes
evals.expected_output: Define RateLimiter::for('api', fn($req) => Limit::perMinute(60)) in AppServiceProvider; apply throttle:api middleware to route groups in routes/api.php

evals.prompt: Version my Laravel API with route prefixes
evals.expected_output: Group routes in routes/api.php with Route::prefix('v1')->group(...); maintain separate route files per version; use versioned controller namespaces like App\\Http\\Controllers\\Api\\V1

evals.prompt: Return proper HTTP status codes from Laravel controllers
evals.expected_output: Return response(new Resource($model), 201) for create; 204 for delete; 422 is auto-returned from FormRequest validation; 200 for retrieve/update; never use 200 for all responses

should_not_trigger: Create a web route in Laravel with a Blade view
